name: Integrated Math 1
description: Build strong foundations in algebra, functions, geometry, statistics, and mathematical reasoning.
descriptionEs: Desarrolla bases sólidas en álgebra, funciones, geometría, estadística y razonamiento matemático.

days.title: Course welcome
days.summary: Learn our routines and explore what mathematical reasoning looks like.

days.title: Notice and wonder
days.summary: Describe patterns using words, tables, and diagrams.

days.title: From patterns to rules
days.summary: Connect visual growth to numerical expressions.

days.title: Multiple representations
days.summary: Compare tables, graphs, equations, and contexts.

days.title: Reasoning check
days.summary: Explain how two representations communicate the same relationship.
